steps.title: Convert months to years
steps.content:
The original function uses time in years. If $m$ is the number of months, then the number of years is
$$\frac{m}{12}$$

steps.title: Substitute the time
steps.content:
Replace $t$ with $\frac{m}{12}$ in the original population model.
$$r(m)=84{,}000(1.05)^{\frac{m}{12}}$$
The answer is D.
